summary: Completed deep research-driven strategy expansion for short-duration binary contracts, then authored and integrated three novel maker-only, max-position-one templates tailored to crypto 15m execution. Added new seed files, registered them in the built-in snapshot catalog, updated snapshot-loading UI copy to remove hardcoded counts, validated JSON/schema/build integrity, and executed built-in upsert to inject snapshots directly into the live database.
current_status: Three new snapshots are live in the snapshots table and available for restore: Drift ladder maker, Exhaustion snapback maker, and Late squeeze clip; backend/frontend compile/build checks pass for these changes.
